product_name: Hot Wheels R/C Shark Bite 2 Channel Gyro Helicopter

bullets: EASY TO FLY - The Shark Bite has gyro control making it easy to fly indoors or out, with a simple and stylish radio control handset perfect for little hands.
FLIGHT FUN - The Shark Bite is tri-band A/B/C meaning up to three helicopters can be flown at the same time allowing for hours of fun with your friends!
CRASH PROOF - This RC helicopter is durable and robust, meaning it is perfect for learner flyers but it also comes with some replacement parts to keep it performing at it's best!
OFFICIAL LICENSED HOT WHEELS TOY - This 2 Channel helicopter has the iconic Hot Wheels styling and is great for kids 8 years and above.
content.description: The Shark Bite 2 Channel Remote Control Helicopter has gyro control making it easy to fly indoors or out. You can even fly night-time recon missions with the built in LED searchlight! This set even comes with spare rotor blades so the fun never stops!

attributes.whats_in_box: 1 x 2 Channel Helicopter, 1 x Handset, 1 x USB Charger, 2 x Spare Rotors, 2 x Spare Connector Poles, 1 x Instruction Manual

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
